channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "The Drinking Game"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "The Drinking Game."

Duration: 16:30

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, hrannar björnsson, eve nemiroff, ann nelson, paul robalino, ryan creamer, justin cyrul, sam geer, nico romero, chloe badner, ash kron, eve hinz, behind the scenes

item.title: The Drinking Game
item.description:
Players must figure out who the secret sober is or risk losing the jackpot to the traitor.

Duration: 49:58

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, lily du, erika ishii, ele woods, jiavani, angela giarratana, becca scott, persephone valentine, izzy roland, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Crowd Control"
item.description:

Duration: 15:56

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, jazzy collins, sam geer, ryan creamer, kevin stiller, chloe badner, justin cyrul, behind the scenes

item.title: Crowd Control
item.description:
Jeff, Gianmarco, and Josh do some crowd work.

Duration: 40:05

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, jeff arcuri, gianmarco soresi, josh johnson, chris grace, paul robalino, ash kron, nico romero
